behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all asserted paths (js_config/index.ts, js_config/node_version.ts), function name getUnsupportedTypeScriptModuleLoadHint, test descriptions, config keys (vitest/importMeta, import.meta.vitest, includeSource with src-js/**/*.ts), and test command 'vitest run'.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the pattern (catch, err.message, throw err) but doesn't give full code; agent still must write the implementation.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert exact literal strings like '.catch((err) => {', 'err.message +=', and exact includeSource array form, and exact define object forms; alternative valid implementations (e.g., using async/await try-catch, or different formatting) would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests include subprocess invocations of tsc, vitest run, pnpm test alongside textual checks.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests check concrete file contents, import paths, and run compilations/tests — a stub would not satisfy them.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All behaviors (file layout, error handling, inline tests, config updates, import update) are covered by tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are separated into named functions with docstrings indicating F2P/P2P.

no_typos.reason: No typos observed in paths or function names.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points to files relevant to the refactor but does not over-specify lines; localization is part of task description.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Config edits are localized to specific keys in package.json, tsconfig.json, tsdown.config.ts, vitest.config.ts.
